'''gachosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:doater|doater]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doater|doater]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gachosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæchesheth|gæchesheth]] || [[word:gæcheshej|gæcheshej]] || [[word:gæcheshesh|gæcheshesh]] || [[word:gæcheshe|gæcheshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gachochoshoth|gachochoshoth]] || [[word:gachochoshoj|gachochoshoj]] || [[word:gachochoshosh|gachochoshosh]] || [[word:gachochosho|gachochosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gachoshoth|gachoshoth]] || [[word:gachoshoj|gachoshoj]] || [[word:gachoshosh|gachoshosh]] || [[word:gachosho|gachosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gachofshoth|gachofshoth]] || [[word:gachofshoj|gachofshoj]] || [[word:gachofshosh|gachofshosh]] || [[word:gachofshof|gachofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gachoshotho|gachoshotho]] || [[word:gachoshojo|gachoshojo]] || [[word:gachoshosho|gachoshosho]] || [[word:gachoshoko|gachoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gachoshoth|gachoshoth]] || [[word:gachoshoj|gachoshoj]] || [[word:gachoshosh|gachoshosh]] || [[word:gachosho|gachosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gachoshothol|gachoshothol]] || [[word:gachoshojol|gachoshojol]] || [[word:gachoshoshol|gachoshoshol]] || [[word:gachoshokol|gachoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gachoshothotho|gachoshothotho]] || [[word:gachoshojojo|gachoshojojo]] || [[word:gachoshoshosho|gachoshoshosho]] || [[word:gachoshoko|gachoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gachoshothon|gachoshothon]] || [[word:gachoshojon|gachoshojon]] || [[word:gachoshoshon|gachoshoshon]] || [[word:gachoshokon|gachoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gachoshothoro|gachoshothoro]] || [[word:gachoshojoro|gachoshojoro]] || [[word:gachoshoshoro|gachoshoshoro]] || [[word:gachoshokoro|gachoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
